name: adelphos_domain_create_schedule_workbook_for_project
desc: Create a blank MEP equipment schedule workbook (.xlsx) on the Adelphos backend and save it to disk. Uses the project_ref and a schedule type from adelphos_domain_list_schedule_types_for_user. Returns the local file path.

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: Optional friendly project name for the workbook header

parameters.name: item_count
parameters.description: Number of empty item columns (default 6, max 40)

parameters.name: save_to_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to save the .xlsx. Default: %TEMP%/Adelphos/Schedules/{filename}
